title: Japan’s Takaichi Pitches Strength and Stability in Visits to Australia and Vietnam
summary_full: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi is attempting to raise Japan’s profile at a time when China’s clout is rising and doubts about the United States are spreading.
summary_public: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi is attempting to raise Japan’s profile at a time when China’s clout is rising and doubts about the United States are spreading.
